source_description: In a coffee shop, Rachel and Monica sit at the counter while Ross, Chandler, and Joey stand behind a couch in baseball attire. An uncertain speaker says, "All the positions. Right? But instead of bugs, it was first place, Alan. Second place, Alan," over audible audience laughter.
